frameworks.name: EU AI Act
frameworks.obligation: Risk classification (unacceptable/high/limited/minimal); high-risk = FRIA + technical docs + human oversight

frameworks.name: NIST AI RMF
frameworks.obligation: Govern-Map-Measure-Manage cycle; voluntary but US gov adoption path

frameworks.name: OECD AI Principles
frameworks.obligation: 5 principles + 5 policy recommendations; G20 endorsed; most widely referenced globally

frameworks.name: UNESCO Recommendation on AI Ethics
frameworks.obligation: Ethics framework with 11 key values; adopted by 193 member states; links AI to human rights

frameworks.name: AI Bill of Rights (OSTP)
frameworks.obligation: 5 protections blueprint; non-binding but influential in enterprise practice

frameworks.name: NITI Aayog RAI for All
frameworks.obligation: 7 principles; sector guidance docs; public sector adoption framework

frameworks.name: Singapore IMDA MGA v2
frameworks.obligation: Governance framework + self-assessment guide; most practitioner-friendly starting point

frameworks.name: UK DSIT AI Principles
frameworks.obligation: Safety, security, robustness; explainability; fairness; accountability

frameworks.name: Hiroshima AI Process
frameworks.obligation: International LLM governance; foundation model conduct codes

frameworks.name: NIST GenAI Profile
frameworks.obligation: Generative-AI-specific risks mapped to AI RMF functions
